{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/29673689?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Brubbish", "id": 29673689, "login": "Brubbish", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjI5NjczNjg5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Brubbish", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41066", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-611", "name": "Improper Restriction of XML External Entity Reference"}], "description": "### Impact
Using either of the two parsers in the default configuration (with `resolve_entities=True`) allows untrusted XML input to read local files.

### Patches
lxml 6.1.0 changes the default to `resolve_entities='internal'`, thus disallowing local file access by default.

### Workarounds
Setting the `resolve_entities` option explicitly to `resolve_entities='internal'` or `resolve_entities=False` disables the local file access.

### Resources
Original report: https://bugs.launchpad.net/lxml/+bug/2146291

The default option was changed to `resolve_entities='internal'` for the normal XML and HTML parsers in lxml 5.0. The default was not changed for `iterparse()` and `ETCompatXMLParser()` at the time. lxml 6.1 makes the safe option the default for all parsers.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00324, "percentile": 0.24517}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-vfmq-68hx-4jfw", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-21T20:38:44Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vfmq-68hx-4jfw", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-vfmq-68hx-4jfw"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41066"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-24T17:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-04-21T20:38:44Z", "references": ["https://github.com/lxml/lxml/security/advisories/GHSA-vfmq-68hx-4jfw", "https://bugs.launchpad.net/lxml/+bug/2146291", "https://github.com/lxml/lxml/releases/tag/lxml-6.1.0", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41066", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/lxml/PYSEC-2026-87.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-vfmq-68hx-4jfw"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/lxml/lxml/security-advisories/GHSA-vfmq-68hx-4jfw", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/lxml/lxml", "summary": "lxml: Default configuration of iterparse() and ETCompatXMLParser() allows XXE to local files", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-06T00:59:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-vfmq-68hx-4jfw", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "6.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "lxml"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 6.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: lxml: Default configuration of iterparse() and ETCompatXMLParser() allows XXE to local files
